biography: Sadie Sandler (born May 6, 2006) is an American actress. She is the daughter of Adam Sandler and Jackie Sandler, and the older sister of Sunny Sandler. She has appeared in several of Sandler's films including Grown Ups 1 and 2, Jack and Jill, and That's My Boy, as well as co-starring alongside her sister in You Are So Not Invited to My Bat Mitzvah.
name: Sadie Sandler
